title: Proto-Society System Design
summary: Forward-looking design north star for substrate primitives enabling an emergent, governed agent collective layered atop the kagent workflow substrate.
scope: Decay / revalidation policy on catalog objects
notes: Manifest declared SPEC and is honored. Document self-identifies as 'companion design north star ... not an implementation spec' (line 4), which is DOC-leaning prose, but it does define concrete schema-shaped substrate primitives (AgentDisposition, Channel, Post, MobProposal) with YAML examples that function as technical contracts — supporting the SPEC tag. Also carries strong PRD-style goals/non-goals and failure-mode framing. Treated as SPEC per manifest with the understanding that downstream synthesis should weight the YAML primitives as constraints and the prose as design rationale.
